scripts.backendRubyOnRails: cd backendRubyOnRails && concurrently --names "Api_gateway,Categories,Games,Auth" --prefix-colors "red,yellow,blue,orange" "cd api_gateway && rails server" "cd categories && rails server" "cd games && rails server" "cd auth && rails server"
scripts.backendGo: cd backendGo && concurrently --names "Api_gateway,Games" --prefix-colors "red,blue" "cd api_gateway && air " "cd games && air"
scripts.backend: npx concurrently --names "Rails,Go" --prefix-colors "red,yellow" "npm run backendRubyOnRails" "npm run backendGo"
